falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,700 on any single day within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 80% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a similar bottoming structure and the UNKNOWN verdict should shift to BEARISH

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility spike above the August 2024 panic peak would signal a more severe liquidation phase than the referenced bottom, falsifying the pattern match and indicating systemic stress beyond the current model

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below 5,000
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Flight-to-safety bid in bonds combined with equity breakdown would indicate recession/depression pricing rather than soft-landing bottom, invalidating the macro bottom thesis and requiring a risk-off reassignment

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
